question: Should people avoid cholesterol-rich foods to prevent heart disease?
topic: Corrects outdated dietary advice that persists despite scientific evidence showing minimal impact of

sources.name: Secondhand Smoke Exposure and Cardiovascular Effects: Making Sense of the Evidence

discovery_sources.text: Dietary cholesterol intake has minimal effect on serum cholesterol for most people due to genetic mediation—widely supported
